tools.description: Performs a web search using Google Search (via the Gemini API) and returns the results. This tool is useful for finding information on the internet based on a query.

query.description: The search query to find information on the web.

tools.name: google_search

text.description: The grounded response text formatted as Markdown, with inline citation markers and an appended Sources section when available.

index.description: The 1-based citation index shown in the response text.

title.description: The title of the cited source.

uri.description: The source URL or canonical URI.

sources.description: The sources referenced by the grounded response.

tools.description: Starts a Gemini Deep Research agent run in the background and returns an interaction_id immediately; research typically takes several minutes and is a billed multi-step agent run. Never call this tool twice for the same question — poll deep_research_result with the returned interaction_id instead. Optional plan_only requests a research plan for review before execution; previous_interaction_id continues or refines a prior run.

query.description: The research question or topic to investigate.

plan_only.description: Request a research plan for review instead of executing the research immediately.

previous_interaction_id.description: Continue, refine, or approve a prior deep_research interaction by its id.

agent.description: Override the server-configured agent for this call only: 'deep-research-preview-04-2026' is faster, 'deep-research-max-preview-04-2026' is more comprehensive. Falls back to the server-configured agent when omitted.

tools.name: deep_research

interaction_id.description: The interaction id of the started deep research run.

status.description: The initial status of the background research run (typically in_progress).

tools.description: Fetches the status (and, once completed, the formatted report) of a deep_research run by its interaction_id. Call repeatedly until status is completed, failed, or cancelled. Optionally long-poll with wait_seconds (0–60) before returning a non-terminal status.

wait_seconds.description: Optionally long-poll up to this many seconds for the run to reach a terminal status before returning.

tools.name: deep_research_result

interaction_id.description: The interaction id of the deep research run.

status.description: The current status of the research run.

text.description: The formatted research report as Markdown, present only when status is completed.

index.description: The 1-based citation index shown in the response text.

title.description: The title of the cited source.

uri.description: The source URL or canonical URI.

sources.description: The sources referenced by the grounded response.
